PropertyValue: case when exists(select 1 from shipment ship left join shipment_line sl  on ship.shipment_id = sl.shipment_id  left join pick_list_ref plr on plr.pick_list_id = sl.pick_list_id and plr.[sequence] = sl.pick_list_ref_sequence  inner join co co on co.co_num = ISNULL(plr.ref_num, sl.ref_num)  where ship.shipment_id = ShipmentId   and co.credit_hold = 1) then 1 else 0 end
CASE WHEN EXISTS(select 1 from AIT_shipment_package pkg where pkg.shipment_id = ShipmentId and pkg.TrackingNumber is not null)  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
